text:
### Service Level Agreements (SLAs)  
| Service | Availability | RTO | RPO |
|---------|--------------|-----|-----|
| Online Banking | 99.8% | 2 hours | 15 min |
| Mobile App | 99.5% | 4 hours | 1 hour |
| Branch Systems | 99.9% | 1 hour | 15 min |
| Payment Processing | 99.95% | 30 min | 5 min |
name: Chunk 67/102

raw_entities.name: Online Banking
raw_entities.description: Customer-facing digital channel providing online banking services. The system is governed by specific operational targets including a 99.8% availability requirement, a 2-hour recovery time objective, and a 15-minute recovery point objective.

raw_entities.name: Mobile App
raw_entities.description: Customer-facing mobile application for accessing banking services. Operational performance is defined by a 99.5% availability target, a 4-hour recovery time objective, and a 1-hour recovery point objective.

raw_entities.name: Branch Systems
raw_entities.description: Internal systems supporting physical branch operations and customer interactions. The SLA mandates a 99.9% availability target, a 1-hour recovery time objective, and a 15-minute recovery point objective.

raw_entities.name: Payment Processing
raw_entities.description: System responsible for executing and settling payment transactions. Operational resilience is defined by a 99.95% availability target, a 30-minute recovery time objective, and a 5-minute recovery point objective.

raw_entities.name: Online Banking Availability Target
raw_entities.description: Quantitative performance target defining the required uptime percentage for the Online Banking service. The documented threshold is set at 99.8%.

raw_entities.name: Online Banking Recovery Time Objective
raw_entities.description: Operational SLA specifying the maximum acceptable downtime duration for restoring the Online Banking service after an incident. The documented limit is 2 hours.

raw_entities.name: Online Banking Recovery Point Objective
raw_entities.description: Operational SLA defining the maximum acceptable data loss duration for the Online Banking service during recovery. The documented limit is 15 minutes.

raw_entities.name: Mobile App Availability Target
raw_entities.description: Quantitative performance target defining the required uptime percentage for the Mobile App service. The documented threshold is set at 99.5%.

raw_entities.name: Mobile App Recovery Time Objective
raw_entities.description: Operational SLA specifying the maximum acceptable downtime duration for restoring the Mobile App service after an incident. The documented limit is 4 hours.

raw_entities.name: Mobile App Recovery Point Objective
raw_entities.description: Operational SLA defining the maximum acceptable data loss duration for the Mobile App service during recovery. The documented limit is 1 hour.

raw_entities.name: Branch Systems Availability Target
raw_entities.description: Quantitative performance target defining the required uptime percentage for Branch Systems. The documented threshold is set at 99.9%.

raw_entities.name: Branch Systems Recovery Time Objective
raw_entities.description: Operational SLA specifying the maximum acceptable downtime duration for restoring Branch Systems after an incident. The documented limit is 1 hour.

raw_entities.name: Branch Systems Recovery Point Objective
raw_entities.description: Operational SLA defining the maximum acceptable data loss duration for Branch Systems during recovery. The documented limit is 15 minutes.

raw_entities.name: Payment Processing Availability Target
raw_entities.description: Quantitative performance target defining the required uptime percentage for Payment Processing. The documented threshold is set at 99.95%.

raw_entities.name: Payment Processing Recovery Time Objective
raw_entities.description: Operational SLA specifying the maximum acceptable downtime duration for restoring Payment Processing after an incident. The documented limit is 30 minutes.

raw_entities.name: Payment Processing Recovery Point Objective
raw_entities.description: Operational SLA defining the maximum acceptable data loss duration for Payment Processing during recovery. The documented limit is 5 minutes.

properties.what_it_measures: Target uptime percentage for the Online Banking service
Maximum acceptable downtime duration to restore Online Banking service
Maximum acceptable data loss window for Online Banking systems
Target uptime percentage for the Mobile App service
Maximum acceptable downtime duration to restore Mobile App service
Maximum acceptable data loss window for Mobile App systems
Target uptime percentage for Branch Systems
Maximum acceptable downtime duration to restore Branch Systems
Maximum acceptable data loss window for Branch Systems
Target uptime percentage for Payment Processing service
Maximum acceptable downtime duration to restore Payment Processing service
Maximum acceptable data loss window for Payment Processing systems

relationships.description: Online Banking system's operational uptime is measured against its defined availability target.
Online Banking system's disaster recovery speed is measured against its defined recovery time objective.
Online Banking system's data loss tolerance is measured against its defined recovery point objective.
Mobile App system's operational uptime is measured against its defined availability target.
Mobile App system's disaster recovery speed is measured against its defined recovery time objective.
Mobile App system's data loss tolerance is measured against its defined recovery point objective.
Branch Systems' operational uptime is measured against its defined availability target.
Branch Systems' disaster recovery speed is measured against its defined recovery time objective.
Branch Systems' data loss tolerance is measured against its defined recovery point objective.
Payment Processing system's operational uptime is measured against its defined availability target.
Payment Processing system's disaster recovery speed is measured against its defined recovery time objective.
Payment Processing system's data loss tolerance is measured against its defined recovery point objective.
